---
title: "Figure_Study1_1"
author: "Spike"
date: "2026-01-16"
output: html_document
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE)
```

## Load libraries
``` {r, message = F, warning = F}
library(tidyverse)
library(readxl)
library(dplyr)
library(tidyr)
library(cowplot)
library(ggplot2)
library(lemon)
library(ggrepel)
library(showtext)
library(patchwork)
```

## Font and theme settings
``` {r, message = F, warning = F}
showtext_auto()
showtext_opts(dpi = 600)

font_add(
  family = "Arial",
  regular = "C:/Windows/Fonts/arial.ttf"
)

theme_set(theme_classic(base_family = "Arial"))
```

## Import data
``` {r, message = F, warning = F}
df <- read_excel("data/Study_1_Objective_Data.xlsx")
```

## Model metadata
``` {r, message = F, warning = F}
df <- df %>%
  mutate(model = as.character(model))

model_info <- tibble(
  model = c(
    "o1", "gpt-4o", "V3", "R1", "2.5", "2.5 Pro(experimental)",
    "Extended 3.7 Sonnet", "Grok 3 Think", "gpt-4.5", "3.7 Sonnet",
    "gpt-o4-mini", "gpt-o3", "gpt-o4-mini-high", "Grok 3", "2.0 Flash"
  ),
  provider = c(
    "OpenAI", "OpenAI", "DeepSeek", "DeepSeek", "Alibaba", "Google",
    "Anthropic", "xAI", "OpenAI", "Anthropic",
    "OpenAI", "OpenAI", "OpenAI", "xAI", "Google"
  ),
  mode = c(
    "Thinking", "Standard", "Standard", "Thinking", "Standard", "Thinking",
    "Thinking", "Thinking", "Standard", "Standard",
    "Thinking", "Thinking", "Thinking", "Standard", "Standard"
  ),
  display_name = c(
    "OpenAI o1", "GPT-4o", "DeepSeek-V3", "DeepSeek-R1", "Qwen 2.5",
    "Gemini 2.5 Pro", "Claude 3.7 Sonnet (Extended)", "Grok 3 Think",
    "GPT-4.5", "Claude 3.7 Sonnet", "OpenAI o4-mini", "OpenAI o3",
    "OpenAI o4-mini-high", "Grok 3", "Gemini 2.0 Flash"
  )
)
```

## Model-level summary statistics
``` {r, message = F, warning = F}
model_summary <- df %>%
  group_by(model) %>%
  summarise(
    accuracy = mean(accuracy_rate),
    stability_sd = sd(accuracy_rate),
    n = n(),
    .groups = "drop"
  ) %>%
  left_join(model_info, by = "model") %>%
  arrange(desc(accuracy), stability_sd) %>%
  mutate(
    rank = row_number(),
    highlight = case_when(
      rank <= 2 ~ "Top 2",
      rank >= n() - 1 ~ "Bottom 2",
      TRUE ~ "Other"
    )
  )
```

## Task-level data preparation
``` {r, message = F, warning = F}
task_data <- df %>%
  left_join(model_info, by = "model") %>%
  mutate(
    task = case_when(
      question == "Q1" ~ "P-value",
      question == "Q2" ~ "95% CI",
      question == "Q3" ~ "Study Comparison"
    ),
    task = factor(task, levels = c("P-value", "95% CI", "Study Comparison"))
  )
```

## Color settings
``` {r, message = F, warning = F}
provider_colors <- c(
  "OpenAI" = "#0072B2",
  "Google" = "#D55E00",
  "Anthropic" = "#009E73",
  "DeepSeek" = "#CC79A7",
  "xAI" = "#E69F00",
  "Alibaba" = "#56B4E9"
)
```

## Panel (a): Accuracy vs Stability
``` {r, message = F, warning = F}
model_summary$display_name <- gsub("[\u2013\u2014]", "-", model_summary$display_name)
model_order <- model_summary$display_name

model_summary <- model_summary %>%
  mutate(
    nudge_x = case_when(
      display_name == "GPT-4o" ~ 0.007,
      display_name == "OpenAI o1" ~ 0.007,
      display_name == "Grok 3" ~ 0.041,
      display_name == "Gemini 2.0 Flash" ~ 0.109,
      TRUE ~ 0
    ),
    nudge_y = case_when(
      display_name == "GPT-4o" ~ 0.012,
      display_name == "OpenAI o1" ~ 0.024,
      display_name == "Grok 3" ~ -0.01,
      display_name == "Gemini 2.0 Flash" ~ 0.0105,
      TRUE ~ 0
    ),
    label_x = accuracy + nudge_x,
    label_y = stability_sd + nudge_y,
    mode = factor(mode, levels = c("Standard", "Thinking"))
  )

panel_a <- ggplot(
  model_summary,
  aes(x = accuracy, y = stability_sd, color = provider, shape = mode)
) +
  geom_point(size = 4, stroke = 1) +
  geom_text(
    data = filter(model_summary, highlight != "Other"),
    aes(x = label_x, y = label_y, label = display_name),
    size = 13 / .pt,
    hjust = 1,
    color = "black"
  ) +
  scale_color_manual(values = provider_colors) +
  scale_shape_manual(values = c("Standard" = 1, "Thinking" = 17)) +
  scale_x_continuous(
    limits = c(0.75, 1.01),
    breaks = seq(0.75, 1.0, 0.05),
    labels = scales::number_format(accuracy = 1, scale = 100)
  ) +
  scale_y_continuous(
    limits = c(0, 0.28),
    breaks = seq(0, 0.28, 0.07)
  ) +
  coord_cartesian(clip = "off") +
  labs(x = "Accuracy (%)", y = "Stability (SD)") +
  theme_classic(base_size = 14)

panel_a
```

## Panel (b): Task-wise accuracy
``` {r, message = F, warning = F}
task_summary <- task_data %>%
  group_by(display_name, provider, mode, task) %>%
  summarise(accuracy = mean(accuracy_rate), .groups = "drop") %>%
  mutate(display_name = factor(display_name, levels = rev(model_order)))

panel_b <- ggplot(
  task_summary,
  aes(x = accuracy, y = display_name, shape = task)
) +
  geom_line(aes(group = display_name), color = "gray70", linewidth = 0.5) +
  geom_point(size = 4, stroke = 1, fill = "white") +
  scale_shape_manual(
    values = c("P-value" = 24, "95% CI" = 22, "Study Comparison" = 21)
  ) +
  scale_x_continuous(
    limits = c(0.35, 1.05),
    breaks = seq(0.4, 1.0, 0.15),
    labels = scales::number_format(accuracy = 1, scale = 100)
  ) +
  labs(x = "Accuracy (%)", y = NULL) +
  theme_classic(base_size = 14)

panel_b
```

## Combine panels and save figure
``` {r, message = F, warning = F}
combined_figure <- panel_a + panel_b +
  plot_layout(widths = c(1.2, 1)) +
  plot_annotation(tag_levels = "a", tag_suffix = ".") &
  theme(plot.tag = element_text(size = 13, face = "bold"))

combined_figure

ggsave(
  "figure/Figure_Study1_1.pdf",
  combined_figure,
  width = 14,
  height = 7,
  dpi = 600,
  bg = "white"
)

ggsave(
  "figure/Figure_Study1_1.png",
  combined_figure,
  width = 14,
  height = 7,
  dpi = 600,
  bg = "white"
)

ggsave(
  "figure/Figure_Study1_1.svg",
  combined_figure,
  width = 14,
  height = 7,
  bg = "white"
)
```
